mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents (title, content, owner_id, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{ownerId}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, CASE WHEN d.owner_id = #{userId} THEN 'OWNER' ELSE dc.permission END as permission, uds.folder_id as folderId, f.name as folderName FROM documents d LEFT JOIN document_collaborators dc ON d.id = dc.document_id AND dc.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN user_document_settings uds ON d.id = uds.document_id AND uds.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN folders f ON uds.folder_id = f.id WHERE d.owner_id = #{userId} OR (dc.user_id IS NOT NULL AND dc.status = 'ACCEPTED') ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM documents WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT d.*, uds.folder_id as folderId, f.name as folderName, CASE WHEN d.owner_id = #{userId} THEN 'OWNER' ELSE dc.permission END as permission FROM documents d LEFT JOIN users u ON d.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN document_collaborators dc ON d.id = dc.document_id AND dc.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN user_document_settings uds ON d.id = uds.document_id AND uds.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN folders f ON uds.folder_id = f.id WHERE (d.owner_id = #{userId} OR (dc.user_id IS NOT NULL AND dc.status = 'ACCEPTED'))
AND uds.folder_id = #{folderId}
AND d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND d.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{content}, '%')
AND (d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(d.content, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{authorName}, '%')
AND d.created_at >= #{startDate}
AND d.created_at <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY
d.created_at d.updated_at
ASC DESC
